CustomField.description: An optional link to the Hours/Cycles ratio or matrix table as defined in the Lease. When provided, the system will utilize the rates calculated from the Ratio/matrix table based on the FH:FC/FC and FH Matrix and Derate for a given utilization period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: An optional link to the Hours/Cycles ratio or matrix table as defined in the Lease. When provided, the system will utilize the rates calculated from the Ratio/matrix table based on the FH:FC/FC and FH Matrix and Derate for a given utilization period.
CustomField.label: Ratio Table
